id.description: Stable identity; used as the keyed list identity.

startTime.description:
ISO datetime string for when this step started.
Absent for pending steps.

endTime.description:
ISO datetime string for when this step ended.
Absent for pending and running steps.

duration.description:
Human-readable duration string, e.g. "1m 23s".
Absent for pending steps.

attemptCount.description:
Number of attempts made so far, including any retries.
Displayed when greater than 1.

progress.description:
Optional determinate progress value between 0 and `progressMax`.
When supplied, a Progress bar is rendered for the step.

progressMax.description: Maximum value for the progress bar. Defaults to 100.

id.description: Unique id for this detail panel. Used as the Collapsible idBase.

label.description: Trigger label rendered on the Collapsible header.

content.description: Pre-formatted content shown inside the panel.

details.description: Expandable detail panels (logs, payloads, errors) shown inline.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps to render.

label.description: Accessible label for the timeline list.

class.description: Additional CSS classes applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: children
unsupportedProps.description: Optional per-step body content rendered after the step metadata.
